title: May 25
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 25''' is the 145th day of the year (146th in leap years). There are 220 days remaining.</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[File:Star_Wars_Style_A_poster_1977.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']] released on May 25, 1977.]][[File:ReturnOfTheJediPoster1983.jpg|thumb|right|250px|[[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']] released on May 25, 1983.]]</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1935|1935]] – [[George Roubicek]] is born.
*[[1940s#1944|1944]] – [[Frank Oz]] is born.
*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Stan Sakai]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Ray Stevenson]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Frank Klepacki]] is born.
*[[1977]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode IV''' '''''A New Hope''''']] (as '''''Star Wars''''') premiered in cinemas.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[Force and Counterforce]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1983]] – [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|'''''Star Wars''''': '''Episode VI''' '''''Return of the Jedi''''']] was released.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 101|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 101]] published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Allies]]'' published.
*2010 – ''[[Fate of the Jedi: Omen]]'' paperback published.
*[[2011]] – [[Darth Vader and the Lost Command 5|''Darth Vader and the Lost Command'' 5]] published.
*2011 – [[Legacy—War 6|''Legacy—War'' 6]] published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars (2015) 19|''Star Wars'' (2015) 19]] published.
*2016 – ''[[Obi-Wan and Anakin 5|Obi-Wan and Anakin]]'' [[Obi-Wan and Anakin 5|5]] published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[The Art of Solo: A Star Wars Story]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]'' released.
*2018 – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story The Official Guide]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Most Wanted]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[The Mighty Chewbacca in the Forest of Fear!]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Han on the Run]]'' published.
*2018 – ''[[The Moviemaking Magic of Star Wars: Creatures & Aliens]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[The Elder (manga)|''The Elder'']] manga adaptation published in Japan.
*2022 – [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: The Manga|''Star Wars: The Mandalorian'']] manga adaptation began serialization in Japan.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Vol. 2 (manga)|''Star Wars: The Mandalorian Vol.'' 2]] published in Japan.
<noinclude>
